## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] New animations respect `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] Keyboard navigation still works (tab order, focus, `Esc`)
- [ ] User-facing copy lives in `src/config/content.ts`, not in components
- [ ] Verified on desktop **and** a narrow (mobile) viewport
